packages.hypothesis: Brass's Bounty is shared by six Lorehold variants and now has a reviewed runtime model that creates Treasure equal to lands controlled. This tests whether a late ritual/treasure burst is better than the least-blocked two-mana Boros rock without cutting Sol Ring, Bender's Waterskin, medallions, Victory Chimes, or the protection/finisher shell.
